blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked before browser validation because the assigned frontend runtime on http://127.0.0.1:5173 was unreachable on repeated readiness checks.

override.reason: tracking-ui-followup completed implementation features do not declare any `fulfills` assertions, so this milestone has no user-testing scope of its own. The prior failed round incorrectly reused blocked browser assertions from older milestones when 5173 was unreachable. After restoring 5173, the correct action is a no-op user-testing pass for this milestone and to preserve the previously passed statuses for VAL-ENTRY-002, VAL-CROSS-001, and VAL-CROSS-002 from tracking-mainline.
